welcome:
Hello dear {name}! 👋 Welcome to the high-speed world of MoonVPN! 🚀

I'm here to provide you with the best experience for connecting to the free internet. ✨

You can use the buttons below to get started 👇 or if you have any questions, click on /help.
help: Help is under construction... 🚧 More information will be available here soon!
language_changed: ✅ Your language has been set to English.
contact_support: To contact support, you can use the ID @MoonVPNSupport. 😊
account_coming_soon: The account section will be activated soon! 🛠️
wallet_coming_soon: Your wallet management will be here soon! 💳
select_plan: 📋 Please select a plan from {category_name} category:
insufficient_funds: ❌ Your wallet balance is insufficient. Please recharge your wallet or select another payment method.
payment_failed: ❌ Payment failed. Please try again or contact support.
account_created:
🎉 Your account has been successfully created!

📱 Connection details:
{connection_details}

⏱ Validity period: {duration} days
📅 Expiry date: {expiry_date}

🔄 Traffic: {traffic} GB

You can find the connection guide in the 'Help' section.
no_services: ⚠️ You don't have any active services. To buy a subscription, select 'Buy Subscription'.
enter_custom_amount: 🔢 Please enter your desired amount in Tomans:
invalid_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Please enter a valid number.
wallet_charged:
✅ Your wallet has been successfully charged with {amount} Tomans.
Current balance: {balance} Tomans
